title: Turn gift thanks into personal recognition
scenario: A viewer named Mia sends a Rose gift.
action: The host thanks Mia by name and adds personal recognition: 'You are always here when I start a challenge. This really helped lift the room energy.'
effect: The gift becomes public recognition and relationship maintenance instead of a simple transaction, encouraging more viewers to support the room.

en.title: Turn gift thanks into personal recognition
en.scenario: A viewer named Mia sends a Rose gift.
en.action: The host thanks Mia by name and adds personal recognition: 'You are always here when I start a challenge. This really helped lift the room energy.'
en.effect: The gift becomes public recognition and relationship maintenance instead of a simple transaction, encouraging more viewers to support the room.

zh.title: 把礼物感谢变成个性化认可
zh.scenario: 观众 Mia 送出 Rose 礼物。
zh.action: 主播点名感谢 Mia 并个性化认可：“你每次我刚开始挑战的时候都在，这一下真的帮我们把气氛拉起来了。”
zh.effect: 礼物不只是交易，而是变成公开认可和关系维护，鼓励更多观众参与支持。

title: Use low-friction choices to revive chat
scenario: Chat slows down before the host starts the next challenge.
action: Instead of a generic call for interaction, the host gives viewers a two-choice prompt: 'Next round, should I try a fast song or a slow song first? Type 1 for fast, 2 for slow.'
effect: Viewers only need to type a number, so participation is easy. Chat can recover quickly, and the next segment feels co-created by the room.

en.title: Use low-friction choices to revive chat
en.scenario: Chat slows down before the host starts the next challenge.
en.action: Instead of a generic call for interaction, the host gives viewers a two-choice prompt: 'Next round, should I try a fast song or a slow song first? Type 1 for fast, 2 for slow.'
en.effect: Viewers only need to type a number, so participation is easy. Chat can recover quickly, and the next segment feels co-created by the room.

zh.title: 用低门槛选择题拉起弹幕
zh.scenario: 评论区变慢，主播准备进入下一轮挑战前。
zh.action: 主播没有空喊互动，而是给观众一个二选一问题：“下一轮你们想看我先挑战快歌还是慢歌？快歌扣 1，慢歌扣 2。”
zh.effect: 观众只需要输入数字就能参与，互动成本低，弹幕会快速恢复，同时也让下一段内容选择显得由观众共同决定。

title: Turn skeptical comments into explanation moments
scenario: A viewer comments that the challenge rules are hard to understand.
action: The host first acknowledges the confusion, then restates the rule in one clear sentence: 'Good question. Let me make it clearer. This round is not about speed. It is about whether I can finish the assigned move within 30 seconds.'
effect: The skeptical comment is not ignored or rejected. It becomes a chance to clarify the room rules and lower the entry barrier for new viewers.

en.title: Turn skeptical comments into explanation moments
en.scenario: A viewer comments that the challenge rules are hard to understand.
en.action: The host first acknowledges the confusion, then restates the rule in one clear sentence: 'Good question. Let me make it clearer. This round is not about speed. It is about whether I can finish the assigned move within 30 seconds.'
en.effect: The skeptical comment is not ignored or rejected. It becomes a chance to clarify the room rules and lower the entry barrier for new viewers.

zh.title: 把质疑评论转成解释机会
zh.scenario: 有观众评论说挑战规则看不懂。
zh.action: 主播先承认对方的疑问，再用一句话重新解释规则：“你问得对，我再说清楚一点，这轮不是比速度，是看我能不能在 30 秒内完成指定动作。”
zh.effect: 质疑没有被忽略或反驳，而是变成补充说明，能降低新观众理解门槛，也让直播间规则更清楚。
